reviews.review_description:
Very good graphics,a good start on a survival game that just came out a month ago.Favorite survival game so far.a little better than green hell but better start of a survival game than green hell.when i made this review,i have not yet to play Neolithic dawn but i know it will be good.i hope people continue to support Neolithic dawn.hope the creator of Neolithic dawn has a good r
rest of there life.worth the 20$.

reviews.review_title: Awesome game but could use some work
reviews.review_description: You should make it so we can pull out a book like frost survival, green hell, and medieval dynasty to craft items and build tents and building also should add an animal husbandry thing like green hell when you tame wolves but you could also tame other animals and have them reproduce. I also like the moose and fox update btw and for some reason it gives a sense of nostalgia when the sun goes down and when it rises. This is an edit thank you for responding and I saw that other guy talking about the baby responsibility that’s cool and all but the rideable things and medicine making that would be awesome I always wanted medieval dynasty to be more like the Xbox version so it has horses and I can’t wait for that game to add those things I mean not the medicine but the  horses and cattle and sheep and ducks also you should keep making survival games and I haven’t gotten too far in the game but can you grow crops and if not can you work on that but I understand if not because you have your hands full

reviews.review_title: Amazing game but could need some work
reviews.review_description:
Good: I love this game. The graphics are good, the amount of different animals is great, the weaponry is awesome, and I love the storyline. There is multiplayer if you want to play with friends, single player for if you want to experience the game for yourself, and even a hangout mode if you just want to chill with people. And all of this comes for a not too bad price of $19.99/ $20


Bad: I seriously can’t think of many bad things about the game. One of the main things is sometimes i throw the spear and it disappears. Also the snow could use some better graphics when falling from the sky.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review and feedback! 🙏 I'm glad you're enjoying the game, we have lots of updates planned for 2026 I'll see if we can improve that snow effect 😁

reviews.review_description: First of the bat is there a way to replay the tutorial because if not you should add that because I have seen the updated tutorial and want to play it(edit figured it out. Also found a bug on how to duplicate sticks by pulling them off your quick tool slot)Another thing I’m pretty sure this is just part of the tutorial but the whole idea of a baby system is cool and I like the thought of having a little baby on your back and if you want your bloodline to continue when you die you need to keep this baby healthy by feeding it and keeping warm and safe from predators. Maybe you could just get the baby in the next life but you could also get the baby through doing a certain amount of quests for NPCs so it doesn’t just give you karma and spirit points (that parts just an after thought though don’t dig to deep into it 👀) but it could also be a way to get cavemen companions.last part when they get older if you survive that long you can teach them things so when you become them they have certain better quality’s like faster climbing. You could also add the idea of being able to breed you tames with each other and make a strength system where weaker animals are easier to tame but don’t give as much strength to their children like strong animals would (yeah it’s just ARK but it’s cool darn it). Also thing like painting walls, sickness and flower cures,and being able to ride tames are also cool ideas. Last thing their is a bug where when your at the river village it puts you in a lock where the quest keeps making you have to talk to the elder and retire so 7 retires later and a lot of tutorials I finally was able to get to the end so please fix that. But overall I love the idea of this game and really want to see it get even better but yeah awesome game would recommend you should be proud.

developer_response.body:
Awesome feedback! I definitely want to do more with the baby, maybe you can mush up food and have to keep the baby alive also? If you want to go out somewhere dangerous maybe you can leave the baby with the elder or back at camp for players who dont want that added responsibility 😁
We have plans to add cooking, and medicine making, riding tames is also on the road map after our base building update!

reviews.review_title: Bugs? Edit:Skill issue on my part
reviews.review_description:
It’s kind of fun, but I’ve encountered problems with being unable to see any stats as the B button(upper button on right controller as the game puts it), does nothing. It’s also way too easy to get lost, as I can’t find my way back to the camp site. And I can’t do the story as talking to the elder does nothing(and why is the talk button the same as the button that’s supposed to open the stats anyways??). I can’t fill the water gourd, though that may be because the tutorial went by too fast on that part. But I beat a wolf to death with my bare hands, so that was fun.

Edit:The developers very kindly told me what I was missing, as opposed to a general reply and it is VERY much appreciated and I hope them the best!

reviews.review_title: If I could give 0 🌟 I would...UNPLAYABL
reviews.review_description:
First off, fix your tracking!!! Omg nothing goes into the hands properly, it's so off....
2nd, I cannot hold anything, I pick up a rock, it drops, I pick it up, it drops and this goes on till I say forget it🤬
3rd, your tutorial seems half assed and more focused on lame story....
4th, when I finally get to the survival aspect in the full game, what is there to do? I haven't found a single tree to break, no logs, no sticks, no rocks, I'm so confused how is this even a survival game?  
I bought this game for my husband and myself to play so that's twice you got paid so we could check it out and man it's seriously unplayable. 
I tried so many times, I took my "weapon" and tried to fight a grey wolf (first predator encounter) every time I went to stab him it just dropped my weapon, I died several times and still never successfully stabbed anything but the ground. 
Now mind you this is all in survival mode since story is only single player. 
But I'm left to imagine your story version isn't much better. I'll change my review when you fix your game I paid twice for and can't even play. 
🫤
Also ur tutorial played the same way, kept dropping things for no reason, lost my knives so many times I had.to reset the tutorial just to get through it and get the knives back, it takes like 30 stabs to the wolf's face to kill it, the baby get glitched out in several areas during the wolf's battle, found the baby by the river, under the stone, and when u put it in the boat and push it down the river it just stays floating while the boat takes off and for fun I threw the baby in the river to see if it'd float down and it did nothing lol. 
Just so bad, I'm honestly sad I paid for this game in it's current state. 
I had high hopes too so I'm looking forward to updates.🤞

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your detailed feedback and sorry to hear your first experience was not so good! I want to let you know I appreciate your feedback on the tutorial and we will look for ways to improve this for other players.

The following things you mentioned have been fixed in version  1.1.4 which has just been released:

1. The bug where items would drop out of your hands fixed! This may have affected some players more than others depending on height calibration and seated vs standing mode

2. Baby physics glitches in the tutorial resolved 

3. There is no tree cutting yet, but we are working on a big base building update to add this! Previously the game was focused on wilderness survival, gathering resources and food from the environment and hunting / eating animals. 

We are listening to all the feedback from the community and the team is working hard to meet expectations. Some players preferred no story or objectives, so we added Survival Mode. Players are asking for tree chopping and base building, so we are working on that now and will be updating soon, I hope you will give Neolithic Dawn another chance in the future after these updates 🙏

reviews.review_description: How do I refund this ahh game bro it actually sucks don't waste your money

developer_response.body: Hey sorry to hear you had a problem with the game! Can you explain what you mean by "Story mode broke?" Like was there some kind of glitch or something in one of your save files? 🤔 If you can tell us what went wrong we can probably fix it in the next update!🙏

reviews.review_description:
This game has a lot of potential to it and I feel that it would really bring this game up to top seller if they fixed all the bugs and graphics.

-to developers

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! 🙏We are working on more bug fixes and do plan to improve some of the graphics as we work on new features and optimize the game :) 

Thanks for playing, Neolithic Tribe Strong! 💪

reviews.review_description: I bought this game during early access, even tho it had bugs and all I enjoyed every minute I have played so far. The biggest thing with this game that makes me so happy as a 0layer is being able to communicate with the devs and talk about possibilities of new ideas and what may be in store for Neolithic dawn.
I literally cant pick anything up. I grab then it just falls out my hand immediately.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, that was a serious issue for sure! We were able to fix the bug in version 1.1.4,  apologies for any frustration it may have caused you, but its fixed now and we hope to see you back in Neolithic Dawn!

reviews.review_description: When this game first came out I didn’t think much of it but one month later I thought about it. Then I got it I was really exited to play it and it was great. I love how you can tame animals. The climbing and building is great. I just like how you feel like a cave man I still haven’t played with friends but I know it’s gonna be great.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We just pushed a big update to fix a lot of bugs in the game and have some new animals coming soon :)

reviews.review_title: It’s good, but could be better
reviews.review_description:
I’d say overall the game is good but there are a lot of little annoying things that hold the game back. For example:
-the fact the quick tool feels like it swaps shoulders whenever it wants 
-the backpack in general feeling really messy too use
-the running in the game feeling like it stops every other second when using my arms and holding down the left joystick feeling uncontrollable (I think just having the option to toggle sprinting would help this)
 Even with all this I’d still say the game is good enough to recommend, just maybe at a decent discount.
this is genuinely a good game.
i love the game sure it could be buggy sometimes so far the single players good but i cannot find anybody to play with :(

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback and review! 
We just updated the game to fix a ton of bugs in version 1.1.4 🙌

If you are looking for friends to play CO-OP with we have a channel in our Discord server where people can find a squad :)

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed this game but there are so many bugs that increase as the game progresses. Will increase to 4 stars if fixed. I think it’s a survival adventure game but not as hardcore survival as Green Hell. So the more hardcore survival fans may not like this game. I like adventures so I did.

neolithic dawn has to be one of the best games ive ever played, it has a whole storyline, is very realistic, and has tameable animals, the game is surprisingly realistic on a quest, i play it all the time and i reccomend it if you have some spare cash, the only thing the game needs is a sandbox mode

I like a lot about this game, and I thing it’s pretty good for how new it is. However, I feel that there a few things holding it back. The quick tool and backpack feel clunky for one. I feel like I had to fight off bears and wolves every five seconds, and the sprint feels way too short. These are early humans, they should be in incredible shape. I had a few bugs regarding the music, but that’s pretty much it. I also wish that there were online servers for multiplayer, and that you wouldn’t just have to join a friend.
Overall I think the game is pretty enjoyable.

Basically i make funny youtube shorts and when i seen the ooga booga chic in the tutorial i did some funny stuff for a youtube short that popped in my head. Im in single player mode i own the headset and the game so imagine my surprise when i noticed a violation of the meta guidelines on January 2nd. I erased my memory and started it from the beginning today and when in the tutorial i tried to get the same footage i made before and the ooga booga chic was covering her body and when the wolf takes her out i couldn't throw her body around the oculus rules are for online multi-player not for your personal property i purchased your game and can do whatever i want in 1 playa mode stop spying on people im a grown 45 year old man so stop playing because you don't got a right to sell me a game i can play without internet and tell me what to do in story mode. You understand if word of this gets out meta will be mad at you i got 5k followers on tiktok all real gamers not the 35 people on meta. These are tge things that keep people from buying meta. If you didn't do that I'd have given you 4 stars i believe i played longer than 2 hours but yeah i guess i got a better yt video to make now dont i.

developer_response.body: Hey that sounds really creepy but dude I promise you I do not have the technology to watch what you are doing in-game, we do not store any data either on any servers at all, only on your local device. Small indie studio we wouldn't begin to know how to put spyware into the game nor would we want to, if I had to guess maybe something Meta does when you share a video, maybe from FaceBook but also I think thats crazy to give a violation like that for our game you cant even hurt NPCs its pretty harmless imo. Anyways, sorry that happened to you but again I promise we have nothing to do with that and we do not / cannot  watch players

reviews.review_description: Sloppy arms and sometimes your things just disappear you never update your game and the bag just fly's away sometimes ￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, can you clarify what you mean by sloppy arms? We are working on fixing the stretching issue now and after reworking inventory storage there may still be a few kinks to work out, but we just updated the game a week ago adding a new game mode, multiple saves, and addressing a lot of other bugs :/ sorry to hear you didn't have a good experience feel free to let us know on Discord what we can do to improve it for you!

reviews.review_description: Im in the tutorial rn. Items keep phasing through floor or just disappear. It won't let me eat anything at all. And it's not letting me bring up my character stats. I managed to bring up the stats once for a split second but nothing after that. This game has potential, i know it's early access but the bugs are making even the tutorial unplayable. Oh and the swinging animation for the axe is garbage. It feels way too fluid and loose in my hand

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback! For eating it may be unclear but you have to bring the item to your mouth and squeeze the trigger on that hand to take a bite! As for items clipping that definitely should not happen but I have the team looking into it now. 
Physics can definitely be improved on weapons, likely too much drag / weight on the axe head, I'll see if we can tune it to feel better in the next patch 🙏

reviews.review_description:
So me and my friend were play 
Ing story mode coop but when I tried playing my is was either my both of are arms glitching or are characters go into the air hope this gets fixed
￼

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, we should have a patch out very soon we have been working on this along with some issues with the backpack after the last update! 🙏

reviews.review_description:
Fans of the Survival Genre whether its Green Hell or Medevial Dynasty should keep an eye out on Neolithic dawn

The game whilst in EA still has the hallmarks of some thing very good (and for a low price)

There is a little bit of jank but the core loop of gathering, killing, surviving, crafting and exploring is here.

Im looking fowrard to see how the game will continue to update and evolve over time.

I can't remember ever playing such a broken game. Virtually nothing works in this game. Starting with the settings. I've never seen such a bad interface. The body size is constantly displayed incorrectly. Only when you click on it is it displayed correctly. And you can't see which options you have activated. Then you move on to the completely broken tutorial, and yes, it's already the new one. Even here, nothing works properly. Items glitch through the floor, the grab function doesn't work properly, so items just fall out of your hand. I almost couldn't finish the tutorial because the materials I needed had disappeared. Then there's the fight against the wolf... I stood there with no weapon because my spear had already glitched through the floor. I actually wanted to give up the fight because it looked hopeless. When I retreated, I saw the sitting skeleton with the spear. After the fight, I was supposed to put the baby in the boat... what can I say... the boat left without the baby and the baby fell into the river... what nonsense.

It doesn't get any better in the main game. I spawn in front of a cave for the first time and see... nothing. Just pitch black. Why the hell does the game start in complete darkness? I spend at least 10 minutes trying to find my way in the dark. Eventually, I vaguely see that I have to climb a rock. A black rock on a black background... Great job, dear developers. Did anyone even test this garbage?

Other bugs: Spear throwing doesn't work properly. The backpack suddenly switches to the right shoulder for no reason, and there's no way to undo it. Subtitles are covered by characters. Fighting the animals feels terrible. Items suddenly stick to your hand and can't be removed. At the very end, the backpack broke and you couldn't put anything in it anymore because it was permanently in drop mode. After that, I finished this junk and uninstalled it.

This game looks cool on paper me and my freind got it I gifted it to him so I dropped 40 bucks the taming aspect is cool every time we try to revive we get sent into space cool concept would be five stars if not for glitches  I hope you can fix this problem I know vr games are hard to code keep working hard you have got this

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support for the game and review, other reported similar issue after that update but the problem should now be resolved in the latest update 🙏 Thanks for bearing with us as the team works on other bugs, looking forward to seeing you and your friend again soon  in a much less buggy and more stable Megafaunaverse!

reviews.review_description: Very realistic physics, REAL AREAS, real animals (WOOLY MAMMOTH) you craft your own tools, kill and tame animals, and you can get meat by killing them. Also there is a bunch of materials around the map

Been with game since September 2023 and a lot has changed only improvements you can be sure this is no one minute wonder game with a team of developers updating and fixing any little bugs that appear  so forget any thoughts that this team of developers are going to take your money and run in fact the game has already got four massive areas to explore  and quest to complete which is no easy feat as you have to battle the ice cold conditions you can also tame all the predators that want to kill you if you do die you come back as next generation with  area discovered  so don’t wait any longer to start  your journey back to the Neolithic era

I’ve been with this game and playing it for over two years and all I can really say is that I appreciate this game. There isn’t many Vr survival games which I feel like is pretty unfortunate because I feel like the idea could be expanded on greatly but I’m especially a fan of Far Cry: Primal and I feel like this game really brings out the whole Neolithic aspect that I’ve been looking for, in not only Vr games but in games in general. Thank you, James.

The backpack frequently disappears so no matter how many times I reach behind I can’t bring it out so maybe there should be a button option or an interface on the wrist like other games.  The same thing with the so called B status button.  Often I can’t access it or get it to show up.  Something was killing me but since I couldn’t check stats I didn’t know what and had to restart as this was in the tutorial.  The axe kept breaking instead of getting sharpened in the tutorial too despite using the sharpening stick.I think an easier to use quick function wouldn’t be bad either because for all its charms and originality, it’s still tricky and not absolutely reliable to access several of the functions.  Despite having tools or weapons , reaching behind with either hand not only often doesn’t bring out the backpack but doesn’t always bring out the weapon or tool either though it works just a bit more often and reliably than the backpack.

I have not been able to get past early stages yet because of so many issues so far disrupting continuity to be able to reliably and consistently play.  The perspective so far is one of the best interaction with an ai partner pretty good so far but the little bugs really needs addressing  asap.  The climbing function so fat is probably the best I’ve seen in VR.  It’s very reliable and easy to use like it should be and can even work to get around areas and obstacles normally according to the tutorial that are done by different means.  This another great feature, because it has multiple methods to overcome challenges which too many game developers forget.  It might be nice to have multiple outfits and features to make new ones though if it’s already in game I may not have come across it but if not, it would be a good fit extra feature.

Started a new game and skipped tutorial because the backpack keeps vanishing.  I found you can walk away and the backpack will automatically re-equip.  You can only see your stats when eating mushrooms and maybe drinking water.  The tutorial village is empty save for the old woman so it makes wonder if she was abandoned.

I unfortunately found another issue.  My stats say I have no water intake despite having just drunk an entire gourd of water.  And I hear sounds like someone starving or thirsting.  I believe this issue should be fixed fast.
This game is great. It has really amazing physics and the climbing is Amazing. But when you die and you dont spawn where you died it is really annoying because you have to do it all over again.
the graphics are great and the animal skin and generations aspects are interesting. I just wish the game had PVP or more/stronger weapons to use against NPC’s
Why can i not refund the game but it is fun but knowone plays it

developer_response.body: thanks for the feedback! we are working on increasing player counts in multiplayer but as far as refunds go we don't have any control over that, its entirely up to Meta 🙏

reviews.review_description: I really like this game at first I was confused and refunded it but after I did and played another game I couldn't stop thinking about this game so I got it back and been having fun there are some bugs but it doesn't ruin it for me and also every time I get a spear I do caveman noise it fun and I can't wait to see what next for this game

On quest 2 I can literally only see like 5 feet in front of me, everything else turns grey, not just that, the trailer makes the game look so sick, but when i spawned in, I was in a green filled forest, not a single drop of snow in sight, either there was no snow, or I couldn't see far enough to find it! Overall, do not buy this game, its buns.

developer_response.body:
Hey sorry to hear about your first experience on Quest 2. I know the render distance is not the best, we do our best to support last-gen consoles and sometimes that means a tradeoff in graphics. 

As for the snow, the game has full dynamic weather and seasons. All weather conditions and seasons are possible, and they alternate each generation when dying or retiring. That's probably why you didn't see snow in your first run.

reviews.review_description: Honestly a great game only issues I had with it was some of the physics were a bit weird and glitchy having too much weight at the heads of tools multiplayer also has some sync issues and the ai for animals isn’t very good

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! The team will continue working to improve physics and multiplayer, also the weight of weapons will be adjusted for the next patch 🙏

reviews.review_title: If you have that survival game itch
reviews.review_description: Its a 20 dollar survival multiplayer game.  You can afford this and have fun for hours by simply not buying your coffee for 3 days or that fancy salad or taco bell once. These day in age 20 is nothing. Go have fun with it playing this.
I’ve always wanted a caveman game, and this is the first one I’ve seen and even plays good, while it is a little buggy I have extremely high hopes for this game

At first when you see this game you may be surprised on the cool features that you can do. Then after some thought you consider buying the game. You play around seeing everything that you can do, but realize many things while playing this game. First you noticed any weapons you pick, it feels sloppy. It’s like if you pick up a heavy weapon in Blade and sorcery with one hand. It’s can be frustrating at times. Second, pick items up. I have no idea what games the developers played, but why make the grabbing button the top trigger. Just change it so you can grab weapons with the bottom trigger. Third, the game just needs a big update with the gameplay. I mean the features are really cool, but it just seems like they mostly put more time making the features than making the gameplay good. So all I ask is to just fix the gameplay and all the other complaints I had.  Thank you ;p

developer_response.body:
Hey thanks for your feedback and review! All valid critiques we appreciate it, to clarify the trigger for grabbing item, its actually both. We included pressing the trigger while highlighting in your backpack and distance grabbing as a quality-of-life accessibility option, you can always still use the regular grip for distance grab and grabbing items and flick / pull the "half life alyx" way to bring items towards you, top trigger is just an optional way to do this faster
Our team is super small, like 3 people, so i agree we definitely tried to do a lot with not so much to work with, everything is a tradeoff in game development but we plan to continue updating and improving the game for the foreseeable future!

reviews.review_title: Decent game fairly buggy but very fun
reviews.review_description: Quite a bit of bugs but very fun especially with friends I met a lot of friends when this game came out I’m making this review for the buddy system but it is my honest review
I haved play this game for sometime and I can tell that it is worth it and I am excited for the survival gamemode without any objectives

I initially bought the game with friends with no hope it was good and well it wasn't so I refunded it. But today I gave it another shot and the game was genuinely really bad: The initial tutorial is awful, the multiplayer guide through the game is buns ( it gives you quests but doesn't tell you where to go, which I understand in a small map where there is only one way but not in an open world ). Everywhere I want I always see an animal tag from miles away, the backpack mechanic is also very bad. This game is genuinely unenjoyable and straight up completely trash. Btw I forgot to mention that it flings you into space randomly insta killing you. It also doesn't tell you how to progress in generations apart from dying. Horrible game, if you are a little team test the game if it is enjoyable to others like a trial on a discord but don't release and price a horrible game and give it a spectacular trailer, it feels like a scam.

developer_response.body:
First off thank you for your honest feedback and review! I'm sorry to hear you didn't have a good experience with the game, but thank you for saying the trailer is spectacular :) 

We are working to improve the game while in Early Access, but there are still issues in the multiplayer especially and from the last update. I pushed a small patch to fix the falling through space issue in co-op and have made a note about the animal tags bug (they are supposed to only be visible when looking at an animal, other players have encountered that same issue and I am looking into it. I do hope you'll try again in the future after a few updates, thanks again for your feedback! 🙏

reviews.review_description: Updated my review since the game was updated and some bugs fixed!  I found the developer to be very responsive and now just looking forward to more updates!
Great co-op so far, looking forward for more updates!
Has some bugs but it is still in early development so it’s fine. But overall a great game. Definitely worth the money.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! 🙏 We have lots planned for 2026, if you run into any issues or have any ideas for improving the game feel free to share on Discord. Neolithic Tribe Strong! 💪

reviews.review_description: I love the game it sometimes makes me confused that’s fun I like bare hand fight a bear and barley winning I can’t wait to find a mammoth
I cannot refund the game I just got it and it says played more than two hours

developer_response.body: Hey sorry too hear you had a bad experience with the game! 🙏 refunds are something controlled by Meta, we don't have any control over that, but if there's something specific that mad you want a refund please reach out to us on Discord so we can make it better for you and anyone else who might have the same problem!

reviews.review_description:
This is a great game and i love it. It has a few collision bugs and sometimes minor things dont work but overall it is a great game and has so much potential. Also when I tried to take a wolf and threw some raw meat it ate it but attacked me anyway but I don't know if it was my fault or if it was a glitch. An amazing game though  
So developers, keep up the great work. Recommend to buy.
I don't know why

developer_response.body: Hi sorry to hear, do you mean the game itself is not launching on your headset or a certain level is not loading? 🤔  We want to fix this for you as soon as possible but might need some more information! Feel free to open a support ticket or just reach out to me directly on Discord and we can help figure that out 🙏

reviews.review_description: U can't join random people's servers it's only ur friends
every time i joined her lobby game nobody's joining

developer_response.body:
Hi we want to help solve your problem but can you provide more information? 
Is it your co-op game that players are unable to join, or campfire hangout being empty? We have a patch coming  soon that should help with co-op issues maybe it will fix this too

reviews.review_description: AMAZING really good job game devs
Things drop out of my hand no matter how many times i pick it

developer_response.body: Hi fia_penderghast thanks for your feedback, this bug was fixed in the last update version 1.1.4! Sorry for any frustration that may have caused you, hope to see you back in Neolithic Dawn now that its fixed!

reviews.review_description: It’s okay it ain’t the best it’s kinda boring

reviews.review_title: Best VR game I've ever played
reviews.review_description: And I have played a LOT. it's amazing
i love the stoneage so i love this game
Wouldn't let me refund even tho I was eligable

developer_response.body:
I'm sorry we don't have any control over the refunds only Meta does! 
We are about to push an update to fix many of the known bugs in the current version, what part made you want to refund? Maybe we can help resolve your issue!

reviews.review_description:
I almost was like wtf but I kept going and then the story and adventuring got me intrigued and the way you level up by dying and then being reborn as your kid is cool too but booooy oh boy does it need a major overhaul of graphics and collisions and just all around physics of hunting, fighting, the way things interact with you and each other,  (ie wolf fighting other wolves or you) and the grabbing of things off of your shoulder like weapons. The walking, running, jumping and climbing needs work too. Like trying to walk up a log is too hard if not impossible and the sounds it makes when you grab it or anything for that matter all sound the same, like rocks being shuffled.

You have something nice here, but it just needs A LOT of polish. I've played enough of the early access to know I like it, so I'm gonna wait until it is finished until I play some more! Keep up the good work and I can't wait until it's finished
The fame didn't let me grab my backpack and it just floated there preventing me from doing what I needed to

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and your review, the last few updates have solved a number of bugs with backpacks, save files, and story progress that should fix what happened here. Hope you will give the game another chance now that its had a few updates! 🙏

reviews.review_description: Control of your backpack and what you are supposed to do is a learning process.   It has been fun so far and has a lot of potential.
On bear island the boss fight is broken I hit him and he glitches into the ground I’ve got so mad at this￼

reviews.review_title: Survive the Neolithic — If You Can
reviews.review_description:
Neolithic Dawn delivers a fresh take on VR survival by throwing you into one of the most dangerous and fascinating eras in human history: the Neolithic age. From freezing temperatures to wild animals, nature is your biggest threat. A well-paced tutorial helps ease you into this primitive world, gradually teaching essential survival skills. The story draws inspiration from ancient traditions, adding a sense of purpose to your struggle. Solid game mechanics, immersive environments, and a raw sense of realism make this a must-try for fans of survival experiences.
Do you have what it takes to survive the dawn of civilization?

reviews.review_title: This game is worth every penny and more.
reviews.review_description:
These devs listen, and know what they are doing. This game with the ability to climb anything should be done in ANY VR title. 

This game should be used as a flagship title of all VR games. 

And there is a fan I have when I stream this game, that is inspired so much from your game, they are learning to develop VR games now.

 This game is a gem hidden in the trash. You got to check this game out.

reviews.review_title: Perfect game for Stone Age enthusiasts
reviews.review_description: This game is truly perfect; it has everything you could want. I especially like the fact that you have to build a realistic fire with sticks, stones, and hay  there's a lot of realism there.I would really like it if the graphics could be improved a little.

This is the best game I’ve ever seen it got fighting crafting and you can even make your own shelter 🤯 only sad thing I still can’t make a fire i tryd a half hour and the I just skipped it. But  it’s soo cool you should try it.

See you in game 
(Psst they have multiplayer survival)

Some items like the spear fall through the floor sometimes and the crouch wasn't working (I was sitting because it prevents me from getting motion sickness when playing VR so I couldn't physically crouch) 

Other than that it's a solid game even for early access can't wait for when you polish the game up for full release in the future

reviews.review_title: Great game, found a bug though.
reviews.review_description: It's an amazing game! Found 2 bugs in it though. 1: randomly, the character will glitch out and you'll be floating above ground unable to bend down properly without recalibrating. Not a big deal, just annoying. 2: when the pack is full, and you try to put something else in it, the pack glitches and you can't take anything out. It stays stuck on the insert item screen over it.

The game can be fun at times but there is a lot of bugs mainly with the physics, and the tutorial not showing a lot of the mechanics of the game aside from crafting and the movement. There’s also some collision issues for example in the intro when I threw the spear it went into the ground and I had to restart. I also wish that the game told you how to get rocks lucky it didn’t take me a while but other players might be roaming around for awhile trying to figure out how to get rocks. The skinning is also a bit buggy too. But it is pretty good for a game in early access and I can’t late when the game is fully released just please don’t release when it’s in a state like this.

developer_response.body: Appreciate the review and great feedback! We have a big update coming soon to fix the confusing / missing parts from the tutorial, you aren't the only one who found it lacking we totally agree 🙏  Team is working extra hard to address the worst bugs and improve the experience this weekend, thanks for being a day one OG! 💪

reviews.review_description: so i’ve heard only good things so far this game looks sick and i can’t wait to tame a wolf

reviews.review_title: Best Survival Game U Can Buy
reviews.review_description:
I got the game the second it released and instantly hopped on. With my experience I only have 2 complaints. 1: the fall damage is kinda annoying,
Not saying to get rid of it I’m saying make it so u gotta fall from a higher position.
2: yk how u can see ur health, hydration,etc, well idk if this was on purpose but personally I can only look at it buy like for example, the elders.
Besides that this game is the best survival game money can buy, and it’s for an amazing price, and I gotta say just good job to James and his team behind this game. 5/5
So is anyone else having this issue? I’m going up against the Glyptodon and the middle of whooping its butt it suddenly no chips, is this a bug or something

developer_response.body: Yes its a bug, we are working on that now! The Glyptodon gives us so many problems😭 should be fixed in the next patch!

reviews.review_title: Great Game, but it needs some work!
reviews.review_description:
This game is amazing. Think Green Hell—but set 5,000 years earlier. It’s rough around the edges, but that’s expected since it just launched. You can climb, swim, hunt, and explore, which really brings the world to life. The story is engaging, and the world layout is impressive.

That said, the tutorial could use some work. It doesn’t do a great job of teaching the basics, especially crafting. Also, I wish you could smash two rocks together to craft or break something—that might just be my Green Hell instincts kicking in, though.

It definitely needs a few updates, but once it hits version 1.0, I have high hopes. This could become something truly special.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! We are working on a brand new tutorial to fix the confusing current tutorial that is missing some steps. We appreciate you trying Neolithic Dawn in Early Access and will have weekly updates prioritizing user feedback to improve the experience for everyone 💪

reviews.review_description: so i bought this and expected it to be good but it never gets updates

developer_response.body: You are right it has been too long since our last patch!!! My bad cuz 😭 we have been working on catching Steam up with the Quest version and been focused on improving performance on Quest 2 & 3 while fixing a lot of bugs - will have an update soon! Once things are more stable and the bugs are fixed we can start doing more content updates!

reviews.review_description:
Please add a toggle setting for crouching in the in-game menu. Also the Please fix the backpack. One moment I'm climbing up, the next i somehow grab the back or quick tool. And I would recommend a longer burn time for campfires and torches. Not even 2 minutes in and I keep relighting everything.


Other than that the game is truly something special. It reminds me of Farcry primal in a way. Keep it up.

Love survival crafting games I've played all sorts from Minecraft to green hell the forest and everything in between on VR and console the controls are horrible picking things off off the ground unnecessarily complicated needs option for wrist storage instead of just for hips backpack mechanic is clunky I hate to say it but a lot could be taken from medieval dynasty as far as backpack interface using the bottom grip for picking things up and the top for quick pulling it into your inventory would change really help. Regret spending £9 on it good idea really needs better grab mechanics inventory and storage and definitely some polishing.

developer_response.body: I appreciate the feedback 🙏 we're a small team of just a few people working on the game, one star really hurts us but I understand if that's how your truly feel just know I will will work extra hard to get those updates out very soon and we are always available to chat on Discord to improve the experience for everyone!

reviews.review_description:
I like this game, I fist fought two bears then died of starvation 10/10.

In all seriousness though, I’m a big fan of green hell VR but wished it was more realistic. This is what it is, if you’re considering buying this game do it. The negative reviews are all from people who can’t comprehend what Early Access means and are upset when the game doesn’t work as it should. It is a bit complex so definitely watch some videos before getting too into the game. Also, did I mention you can fist fight bears?
I play on it a lot and all I’m doing now is waiting for the full game to come out

I want to like this game, but there are so many bugs. The movement has issues,  skinning an animal is difficult, my blade gets stuck, and i have a difficult time getting it out. throwing your spear may disappear when it hits its target or its the ground.  Findings rocks is nearly impossible.  I can find a lot of sticks. I hope that the game will be fun on e all the glitches are fixed.

developer_response.body: We have a patch that will be out soon with a BUNCH of bug fixes including a fix to the blades getting stuck and disappearing items bugs, also added many more rock spawns to the first two maps where users had problems finding them! 🙏 Thank you for the great feedback, team is hard at work to solve these problems and improve the experience for everyone!

reviews.review_description: IT GOT BETTER WITH GRAPHICS

There’s a lot of bugs in this game that should have been resolved when testing my game can’t even save I click save and quit and when I load back in my progress is all gone I puts me back in my last save which as a completely different save because I had to restart again and again because I kept falling through the map, losing my backpack,  or losing progress. And please fix the tamed animals as my wolf looks at a Stag but doesn’t chase it. The reason I’m rating it five stars is because without these problems this game is amazing and probably the best vr survival game I’ve played with the best crafting, animal models, and mechanics. I just think with some work this game could be game of the year.

This review was made after ~20 hours of gameplay (mp and sp).
First of all: yes 2 stars are bad and this game has alot of potential, but in this state its nearly unplayable for me. 
The first map of this game (find the starmap) works fine, its not super good and polished but its working. The cave is often a dark mess, but at least its not glitching all over the place. Where it starts to fall apart is the second map (find the celestial tower).

There are basically multiple ways to the tower (the starmap is basically a compass). In my first savegame ive decided to go through the cave left from the hunter, alot of climbing and weird mapping. You reach a point where you have to die that the landscape change to continue (i think). So i made a break and after that my progress was gone. Did everything all over again... this time i headed towards the predatory cave and this cave is just a mess. Its pitch black, glitches everywhere, every wall is flickering, its just horrible pre alpha stuff. I made it through anyway. Next cave was even worse: i couldnt see anything, the map is full of holes (graphical glitches) and then ive reached a point where i had enough. The game has so many bugs, its unvelievable: die and get reborn-> Hunger stats are frozen. Save and load again-> Hunger stats refilled. Fighting is a joke, just swing ur axe in front of you like crazy and you defeat anything. Skinning animals is super glitchy, sometimes the meat is super small, sometimes it disappears when animals are nearby. Tools are disappearing, backpack tool quickslot is switching the mainhand from time to time. Tooltips are frozen in front of you sometimes. Lighting inside caves is broken, lighting ubderwater is broken. You can skip jump Puzzles cause you can basically climb anything. For sprinting you have to hold your left stick. I could go on forever...

I think in 1 or 2 years it could be good, but until then im out. Its just not enjoyable in this state for me.
The devs seems to be nice and motivated, i really hope they gonna succeed.

developer_response.body: Just reaching out again to let you know we have had a number of updates since you last played, and would love to hear from you once you get a chance to play again! 🙏We fixed a number of bugs in all maps including some Occlusion Culling / Mesh holes and a ton of other problems. Thanks again for your feedback and for playing in Early Access!

reviews.review_description: Such a cool concept! I was pleasntly surprised at how much there is to do!
